name: Lumae Analysis
author: Lumae
description: Precomputes Lumae loudness and MixRamp profiles for server-side volume normalization and SmoothFade.

versions.changelog: Add opt-in Living Collections with mixed album and track membership, a responsive AudioMuse manager, per-user storage, revisions, idempotent mutations, and incremental sync.
Vectorize the BS.1770 biquad filter with SciPy so loudness and MixRamp profiles are ready before playback catches the analysis queue.
Add Queue Whole Library to enqueue every missing, stale, or changed Lumae profile in 250-track worker jobs while keeping Catch Up Now for one batch.
